title: Nathanjo Nirrelz

{{Quote|Gotal guerillas hijacked an atmospheric commuter hopper with 25 passengers aboard, including Gotal Emissary Nathanjo Nirrelz, all in a bid to convince their neighboring homeworld of Antar 4 to secede.|HoloNet News report|<ref name="hijacked" />}}
'''Nathanjo Nirrelz''' was a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] who worked for the government of [[Antar 4/Legends|Antar 4]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], he was sent as an emissary to the neighboring [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]] to secure [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] for his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. However, Nirrelz was kidnapped and held hostage in a [[Passenger liner/Legends|commuter hopper]] by the [[Roshu Sune/Legends|Roshu Sune]], a militant [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] group that intended to use him as leverage in a bid to convince Antar 4 to secede from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The Republic sent a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] task force to Atzerri in response, which negotiated with the Roshu Sune for a [[Standard week/Legends|week]] before the terrorists began to open fire on their hostages. The Jedi [[Gotal hostage standoff|stormed]] the hopper and rescued several of the captives, including an unharmed Nirrelz.

==Biography==
{{Quote|It's a miracle anyone survived this at all.|[[Palhra Wavren]], one of Nirrelz's fellow hostages|<ref name="rescued">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|53|jediwatch/13425_1.html|Gotal Standoff Ends Violently}}</ref>}}
[[File:Sarrissa.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The aftermath of the hostage standoff]]
Nathanjo Nirrelz was a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] from [[Antar 4/Legends|Antar 4]] who worked for the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] government.<ref name="cswe" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], a number of Gotals fled Antar 4 for neighboring [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]] following a [[Battle of Antar 4 (Separatist Crisis)|battle]] on their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] sparked by the [[Roshu Sune/Legends|Roshu Sune]], a militant splinter branch of the [[Gotal Assembly for Separation/Legends|Gotal Assembly for Separation]]. Shortly afterward, Nirrelz was sent to Atzerri on a [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] mission to acquire shipments of [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] from local suppliers. After he boarded a [[Passenger liner/Legends|commuter hopper]] in the Atzerri [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] of [[Skreeka]], five Gotal members of the Roshu Sune hijacked the vehicle and redirected it to a base of theirs in an outlying swamp. The guerrillas then transmitted [[Articles of Secession]] to Antar 4's government, hoping to use Nirrelz and twenty-four other passengers as leverage in a bid to force their homeworld to secede from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="hijacked" />

Antar 4's government was without a security force that could effectively respond to the situation, which prompted the Republic's peacekeeping [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] to dispatch a task force led by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Sarrissa Jeng/Legends|Sarrissa Jeng]] to Atzerri to secure<ref name="hijacked" /> the hostages' release.<ref name="cswejeng">{{CSWECite|II|155|Jeng, Sarrissa}}</ref> The Roshu Sune held their captives aboard the commuter hopper for a [[Standard week/Legends|week]],<ref name="cswe" /><ref name="rescued" /> during which [[Time/Legends|time]] Jeng and her task force attempted to negotiate the release of the hostages,<ref name="rescued" /><ref name="cswejeng" /> particularly Nirrelz,<ref name="cswejeng" /><ref name="db">{{DB|character|sarrissajeng|Jeng, Sarrissa}}</ref> who was the Roshu Sune's intended [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]]. After a week, some of the [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorists]] began to panic and open fire on their captives. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] stormed the commuter hopper, and the ensuing [[Gotal hostage standoff|confrontation]] saw twelve hostages, two Jedi, and all of the terrorists [[Death/Legends|lose]] their lives. Nirrelz was freed<ref name="rescued" /> and unharmed,<ref name="cswejeng" /><ref name="db" /> despite the detonation of a [[Thermite bomb/Legends|thermite bomb]] inside the hopper.<ref name="rescued" /> His capture and rescue were both covered by [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]].<ref name="hijacked" /><ref name="rescued" />

==Behind the scenes==
Nathanjo Nirrelz was first mentioned in "Gotal Guerillas Hijack Commuter Hopper, Take Hostages," an article<ref name="hijacked" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 52|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #52]] on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="hijacked" /> on [[April 18]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN52 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6493893|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-04-18|time=6:27 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref>
